tracks.rawText: 3:22Sombr Back To FriendsUploadAlternative rock with post-grunge influences, Distorted electric guitars play power chords and palm-muted rhythmic patterns, A clean electric guitar provides melodic arpeggios during the verses, The bass guitar follows the root notes of the guitar progression with a thick, overdriven tone, Drums feature a heavy snare and prominent crash cymbals, Male vocals are delivered with a gritty, emotive baritone that shifts into a strained, high-register belt during the chorus, The tempo is 145 BPM in 4/4 time, The arrangement alternates between stripped-back verses with clean guitar and high-gain, wall-of-sound choruses, A melodic guitar solo with wah-pedal filtering appears in the bridge6PublishRemix
tracks.title: Sombr Back To Friends

tracks.rawText: 3:55Studio Selection (15)v5.5CoverPop-rock track with electronic elements, Features a driving drum kit with a prominent snare on the backbeat and a steady kick, Electric guitars provide both clean rhythmic strumming and distorted power chords during the chorus, A synth bass follows the kick drum pattern, Male vocals are present throughout, shifting between a melodic chest voice and a higher register in the chorus, The arrangement includes atmospheric synth pads and occasional electronic percussion accents, The tempo is approximately 124 BPM in the key of G Major, The structure alternates between filtered, more intimate verses and a full-band, high-energy chorus with layered vocal harmonies2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection (15)
